this_title: American Expendables: The Films of North American Pictures
trans_title: 美国极限特工：北美电影公司的电影
introduction: The film celebrates the unsung action stars of the eighties/nineties in the North American Pictures Catalog. From Cynthia Rothrock and Bolo Yeung, to Billy Blanks, it examines the home video martial arts craze in the U.S. at the time.
chinese_title: 美国极限特工：北美电影公司的电影
foreign_title: American Expendables: The Films of North American Pictures
